        "summary": "Full-stack engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring teams.",

    "work": [
        {
            "name": "Tech Corp",
            "position": "Senior Software Engineer",
            "url": "https://techcorp.com",
            "startDate": "Jan, 2020",
            "highlights": [
                "
<p>Lead engineer for the platform team, owning core API infrastructure.</p>
\n",
                {
                    "string": "
<p>Reduced API latency by 45% through caching and query optimization</p>
\n"
                },
                {
                    "string": "
<p>Designed microservices architecture serving 2M daily requests</p>
\n"
                },
                {
                    "string": "
<p>Mentored 4 junior engineers through technical growth plans</p>
\n"
                }
            ],
            "startDateYear": "Jan,",
            "endDateYear": "Present",
            "startDateReadable": "March 2020",
            "duration": "6 years 1 month",

            "$notfirst": false,
            "$last": false
        },
        {
            "name": "StartupXYZ",
            "position": "Full Stack Developer",
            "startDate": "Jan, 2017",
            "endDate": "Jan, 2020",
            "highlights": [
                "
<p>Built customer-facing web applications from prototype to production.</p>
\n",
                {
                    "string": "
<p>Built real-time dashboard used by 15,000+ daily active users</p>
\n"
                },
                {
                    "string": "
<p>Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 2 hours to 8 minutes</p>
\n"
                }
            ],
